daemon.description: Default settings for the local daemon server.

sessionTitles.description: Default settings for background session title generation.

session.description: Default session settings applied to all sessions.

agent.description: Agent to run. Use an installed adapter id or an inline agent distribution manifest.

mcpServers.description: Additional MCP server definitions to attach to the session.

env.description: Environment variables to inject into the session process.

model.description: Model identifier to set for the session upon initialization.

loops.description: Default settings for long-running agent loops.

registry.description: Custom registry of ACP agent distributions.

id.description: Stable machine-readable identifier for the agent.

version.description: Semantic version of the agent distribution manifest.

description.description: Short summary of what the agent does.

repository.description: Repository URL for the agent source or release metadata.

authors.description: List of authors or maintainers for the agent.

license.description: License identifier or label for the agent.

icon.description: Icon reference for the agent, such as an emoji or asset identifier.

binary.description: Binary artifacts to download and run directly.

darwin-aarch64.description: Binary target for the darwin-aarch64 platform.

archive.description: Archive URL containing the platform-specific agent binary.

cmd.description: Executable command to run after the archive is unpacked.

args.description: Default command-line arguments to pass to the binary.

env.description: Environment variables required by this binary target.

npx.description: Package distribution to run with npx.

package.description: Package specifier to install or execute with the selected package runner.

args.description: Default command-line arguments to pass through the package runner.

env.description: Environment variables required by this package-based install method.

uvx.description: Package distribution to run with uvx.

package.description: Package specifier to install or execute with the selected package runner.

args.description: Default command-line arguments to pass through the package runner.

env.description: Environment variables required by this package-based install method.

distribution.description: Instructions for installing and launching the agent.

additionalProperties.description: Structured agent manifest accepted anywhere a config can inline an agent distribution.

port.description: TCP port used by the local daemon control server. Only supported in the global Goddard config.

defaultFolder.description: Default repository-local folder name used for daemon-managed worktrees.

bootstrap.description: Daemon-managed preparation defaults applied to fresh worktrees.

plugins.description: Custom worktree plugins loaded from the global Goddard config only.

enabled.description: Whether daemon-managed worktree seeding and bootstrap are enabled.

packageManager.description: Package manager command to run when bootstrapping a fresh daemon-managed worktree.

installArgs.description: Additional arguments appended to the selected package-manager install command.

seedEnabled.description: Whether selected untracked artifacts should be copied into fresh worktrees.

seedNames.description: Recursive basename allowlist used when selecting untracked seed candidates.

seedPaths.description: Exact repository-relative paths added to the untracked seed candidate set.

path.description: Absolute plugin module path or a path resolved relative to the Goddard global directory.

export.description: Optional module export name to load. Defaults to `default`.

package.description: Package name for a globally installed worktree plugin module.

export.description: Optional module export name to load. Defaults to `default`.

anyOf.description: Structured agent manifest accepted anywhere a config can inline an agent distribution.

session.description: Default session settings applied to all agent actions.

agent.description: Agent to run. Use an installed adapter id or an inline agent distribution manifest.

mcpServers.description: Additional MCP server definitions to attach to the session.

env.description: Environment variables to inject into the session process.

model.description: Model identifier to set for the session upon initialization.

session.description: Default session settings applied to loop-backed agent runs.

agent.description: Agent to run. Use an installed adapter id or an inline agent distribution manifest.

mcpServers.description: Additional MCP server definitions to attach to the session.

env.description: Environment variables to inject into the session process.

model.description: Model identifier to set for the session upon initialization.

rateLimits.description: Loop pacing limits that bound runtime throughput.

cycleDelay.description: Delay between loop cycles, expressed as a duration string.

maxOpsPerMinute.description: Maximum number of tool or model operations the loop may start per minute.

maxCyclesBeforePause.description: Maximum number of completed loop cycles before the loop pauses itself.

retries.description: Retry settings used when a loop cycle or operation fails.

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts after a loop operation fails.

initialDelayMs.description: Initial retry delay in milliseconds before the first retry.

maxDelayMs.description: Maximum retry delay in milliseconds after exponential backoff is applied.

backoffFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the retry delay after each failed attempt.

jitterRatio.description: Random jitter ratio applied to retry delays to avoid synchronized retries.
